claim_tested: The current TEMPO lifecycle has two deterministic authority-integrity defects at start failure atomicity and authorization-only guard enforcement.
limitations: Local integrity evidence is not an external platform attestation
The reproduction targets the pinned Windows checkout and must be repeated on the host matrix
No exploit was used against a third-party repository

measurements.metric: Partial authoritative records after rejected start
Authorization-only write guard decisions incorrectly allowed

provenance.collection_method: Deterministic CLI and guard calls in disposable workspaces with before-and-after state, active, and ledger inspection

sample_context.description: Disposable local workspaces at pinned TEMPO commit 4afc6a3 exercised invalid start event data and a valid warrant with no active or ledger start.
sample_context.population: TEMPO 0.1.0 warrant, start, status, and guard boundary
